content:
type: CLAIM
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Adding register_filter()/unregister_filter() global filter registry to prompts.py

fields.summary: Adding register_filter()/unregister_filter() global filter registry to prompts.py

content:
type: ANSWER
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Added register_filter/unregister_filter + apply_registered_filters(env) helper (updates env.filters from global _FILTERS dict, tracks env in weakref.WeakSet so later register/unregister calls still update already-built envs). Call apply_registered_filters(env) inside your create_jinja_env BEFORE applying your local filters param, so local filters override global ones. No other API surface added; happy to adjust names if needed.

fields.summary: Added register_filter/unregister_filter + apply_registered_filters(env) helper (updates env.filters from global _FILTERS dict, tracks env in weakref.WeakSet so later register/unregister calls still update already-built envs).
